title: Student Cohorts
description: The list of valid student cohorts.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the student cohort.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the student cohort.

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of the student cohort.

code.title: Code
code.description: The code that identifies the student cohort.

startOn.title: Start On
startOn.description: The first date when when students may be assigned to the cohort.

endOn.title: End On
endOn.description: The last date when when students may be assigned to the cohort.

initialAcademicPeriod.title: Initial Academic Period
initialAcademicPeriod.description: The first academic period when students may be assigned to the cohort.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Initial Academic Period.

finalAcademicPeriod.title: Final Academic Period
finalAcademicPeriod.description: The last academic period when students may be assigned to the cohort.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Final Academic Period.
